synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-1597 Moderate: Oracle Linux 10 iperf3 security update
description:
[3.17.1-5]
- Resolves: RHEL-136170 - iperf Heap Buffer Overflow (CVE-2025-54349)
full_text:
